title: Wire practice runtime store to approved engine
goal: Add an isolated practice runtime store that hydrates from practice session data, reuses the approved pure engine for all transitions, and persists runtime snapshots without touching sim runtime code.
constraints: Do not modify src/stores/gameStore.ts, src/pages/GamePage.tsx, src/pages/GameSetupPage.tsx, or sim hooks/routes
Keep src/lib/practice/engine/* pure with no React, Zustand, Supabase, or store imports
No any, as any, ts-ignore, or ad-hoc eslint-disable
No inline filter/map inside Zustand selectors; precompute derived slices in store state
All Supabase reads/writes stay in query helpers, not in engine functions
Persist runtime state only after successful engine transitions
Practice session UI, debug UI, and ghost guide stay out of scope for this task
No extra changes outside the approved write set
acceptance: A new src/stores/practiceStore.ts exists and owns practice runtime state separately from sim stores
The store can bootstrap and hydrate a session from PracticeMenuBundle plus practice session runtime rows
The store exposes transition actions that reuse approved engine APIs for place/action/pour without nodeId-based public inputs
src/lib/practice/queries.ts can create/read/write practice session runtime rows needed by the store
A pure adapter module maps DB rows to PracticeEngineState and precomputes derived runtime data needed for safe selectors
No changes are made to sim runtime files or admin/game cross-import boundaries
No any usage and no Zustand selector rule violations are introduced
Vitest coverage exists for store/runtime orchestration, and npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run test all pass
